title: cassia madrensis
intro: Cassia madrensis, also known as Madras cassia or Alexandrian senna, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and laxative effects. The health benefits of Cassia madrensis include relief from constipation, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. Cassia madrensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
